[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in a wide-brim hat poses indoors in front of a collage-like anime poster background while large overlaid text covers the lower portion of the image.

Main Subject:
A person wearing a black wide-brim hat and a black face covering or scarf-like cloth around the lower face stands facing the camera, holding one hand up with the index finger extended near the chest area; their head is slightly tilted, and they look toward the camera. The person wears a black short-sleeve shirt with a layered necklace or chain visible at the chest.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors, with a desk or shelf visible on the right side and a wall behind them covered with a dense, black-and-white anime-style illustration collage. Lighting appears even and artificial, with no clear indication of a specific time of day.

Visual Details:
The background is dominated by monochrome line art and faces from anime-style characters, arranged like a poster collage. A blue horizontal panel or partition is visible near the lower middle of the background. On the right side, small items sit on a surface, including a figurine-like object and possibly a small stack of items. In the upper left, there is a rectangular blue overlay box with a white interior area, and in the center there is an orange highlighted block overlay over the raised hand area. The camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is dominated by the subject centered in the frame with large text overlay at the bottom.

Visible Text:
SOPAN SANTUN
TELAH HILANG
Ucup Ali as Jos
Uc. as Jos
Kedekue:
Motivateguy:
Rizky
Azka GMG

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person wearing a wide-brim hat and black clothing posing toward the camera in front of an anime-style collage background. Large Indonesian text overlays the bottom of the image, and additional smaller text appears in the right-side area.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

SOPAN SANTUN  
TELAH HILANG

# Structured Version

- **SOPAN SANTUN**
- **TELAH HILANG**

# Notes

- There is additional small text on the right side of the image, but it is too low-resolution/partially obscured to read accurately. Marked as `[unclear]` in that area.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
